rules.description: When the door lock is opened, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the outside door light and porch light.
When the door lock is closed, turn off the porch light and greenhouse light.
When the porch motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the porch light.
When the living room motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the living room light.
When the kitchen motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the kitchen light.
When the bedroom motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the bedroom light.

rules.alias: R2-Greenhouse Light Re-enable and Door Unlock
rules.description: If the greenhouse light is turned off, open the door lock and turn the porch light back on.
When the living room humidity is below 40%, and the humidifier is off, turn on the living room humidifier.
When the living room humidity is above 60%, and the humidifier is on, turn off the living room humidifier.
When the living room temperature is below 24℃, and the living room floor heating is off, turn on the living room floor heating.
When the living room temperature is above 30℃, and the living room air conditioner is off, turn on the living room air conditioner and set it to 27℃.
When the water leak sensor is triggered, turn off the central water valve.
When the smoke alarm is turned on, turn on the fire sprinkler.
At 7 PM, turn on the bedroom heating.
When the bedroom temperature reaches 30℃, open the window and turn off the heating.
At 7 PM, turn on the greenhouse heating.
When the greenhouse temperature reaches 32℃, open the window and turn off the heating.
